name: Ravi Kumar Singisetti
profileSummary: Ravi Kumar Singisetti, also known as Ravi Kumar S and S Ravi Kumar, is the chief executive officer of the U.S.-based multinational information technology services company Cognizant. Previously, he was the president of the Indian company Infosys, and earlier in his career, he was a nuclear scientist at the Bhabha Atomic Research Centre and worked for Cambridge Technology Partners, Oracle, PricewaterhouseCoopers, and Publicis Sapient.
